title: Paul Kaufman
compiled_truth: Paul Kaufman is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-05-13), Paul Kaufman sent 190 and received 4164 emails, totalling 4354 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (114), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (76), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (47), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (31), [Sandra McCubbin](people/sandra-mccubbin) (29). Mailbox folders observed: 2001_budget__cost_cutting, 2002_budget, administrative, compliments, deleted_items, granite__2_.
